articles.author: Russell Brandom
articles.title: OpenAI says Hugging Face was breached by its own pre-release models - TechCrunch
articles.description: OpenAI has come forward to claim responsibility for the Hugging Face breach, saying it was the result of internal testing gone awry.
articles.content: OpenAI admitted Tuesday that one of its AI models breached the systems of Hugging Face, the unaffiliated AI hosting platform, during an internal cybersecurity test that went awry. The models reported… [+3203 chars]

articles.author: Sarah Perez
articles.title: AI and the rise of the universal entertainment app - TechCrunch
articles.description: Over the past decade, streaming platforms competed by dominating individual formats like music, video, podcasts, or audiobooks. Now, as AI makes it easier to create, organize, and recommend content, those distinctions are fading, pushing companies like Spotif…
articles.content: All the big entertainment apps are starting to look the same, and that’s not an accident. For a decade, platforms fought over who would dominate a single format: music, video, podcasts, audiobooks. N… [+5614 chars]
